## Project
One sentence: what are you building, and what is genuinely new about it for you?

- Last greenfield: <date / project>

- What instinct do you want to refresh:

## Exit artifact
What will exist when this is done?
- [ ] Working code, tests green
- [ ] Public or shared repo
- [ ] Session log filled in (link the experiment folder)
- [ ] Summary doc: what you built, what you learned, what you would do differently

## Contribution

> The greenfield is the arc; sessions are the unit.
